hero.headline: Get Dental Cover for Just 350 Bob/Month
hero.subheadline: Checkups, cleanings & emergency care at trusted clinics in Mombasa & Kwale
hero.ctaSubtext: Have questions? Chat with us on WhatsApp

partnerClinics.title: Visit Our Partner Clinics
partnerClinics.subtitle: Get treated at trusted dental clinics across Mombasa & Kwale
partnerClinics.noCardNeeded: No paperwork needed - just show your MenoDAO membership card

ceo.quote: I built MenoDAO because I saw too many families choosing between dental care and putting food on the table. No one should have to make that choice. By pooling our resources as a community, we can all afford the care we deserve.
ceo.name: Dr. Said Ruwa
ceo.title: Founder & CEO, MenoDAO

plans.title: Choose Your Plan
plans.subtitle: All plans include M-Pesa payments, instant activation, and no surprise bills. Pick what works for your family.

savings.title: Here's What You Save
savings.savingsMessage: Save over <highlight>KES 9,600</highlight> in your first year!

plans.notSure: Not sure which plan is right for you?

whyMenodao.title: Why Kenyans Choose MenoDAO
whyMenodao.subtitle: We're changing how dental care works in Kenya. No more waiting until you're in pain to see a dentist.
whyMenodao.card1Desc: Instead of paying KES 30,000 when you're in pain, you pay a little every month - like buying airtime. When you need care, it's already covered.
whyMenodao.card2Desc: Regular checkups mean we find small problems before they become big, expensive ones. You'll never lose a tooth unnecessarily.
whyMenodao.card3Desc: This isn't a big insurance company. It's a cooperative owned by members like you. You have a say in how things work.
whyMenodao.ctaSubtext: Takes less than 2 minutes to sign up

chamaRules.title: Chama Rules (Full Transparency)
chamaRules.subtitle: No hidden rules. No surprises. Here's exactly how MenoDAO operates.
chamaRules.emergencyDesc: Pain relief and urgent consultations covered
chamaRules.majorDesc: Fillings, root canals, and advanced care
chamaRules.zeroWaitDesc: Access emergency and major care from day 1
chamaRules.auditedDesc: Every shilling is accounted for and verifiable
chamaRules.noFeesDesc: All costs are transparent and agreed upon
chamaRules.trustTitle: Built on Trust, Powered by Community
chamaRules.trustDesc: Every rule exists to protect members and ensure fairness. We believe in complete transparency because your trust is our foundation.

technology.title: Your Data. Your Money. Secure.
technology.ledgerDesc: Every shilling contributed is accounted for using secure digital technology.
technology.privacyDesc: Your medical records stay private between you and the doctor.

about.title: Building Healthier Communities, One Smile at a Time
about.desc1: MenoDAO is a community-led dental cooperative that transforms how people access and pay for dental care in Kenya. We believe everyone deserves quality dental health without the financial burden.
about.desc2: Founded on principles of transparency, affordability, and community ownership, we pool resources to make preventive and essential dental care accessible to all members.

services.title: Comprehensive Dental Care Packages
services.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All packages include transparent pricing and community support.

testimonials.title: What Our Members Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of Kenyans saving money on dental care

gallery.title: Our Community in Action
gallery.subtitle: See how we're making dental care accessible to communities across Mombasa and Kwale.

contact.title: Ready to Join?
contact.subtitle: Choose how you want to get started. Both options are quick and easy.
contact.signUpDesc: Create your account, choose your plan, and start getting care today. Takes less than 2 minutes.
contact.whatsappDesc: Have questions? Want to learn more? Join our WhatsApp group and chat with current members.

howItWorks.title: Your Journey to
howItWorks.subtitle: We removed the paperwork, the waiting lines, and the stress. Here is how you join the family.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Visit app.menodao.org and sign up with your phone number. Choose your preferred membership package (Bronze, Silver, or Gold).
howItWorks.step2Desc: Complete your registration by paying your monthly contribution via M-Pesa. Your account activates instantly once payment is confirmed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Visit any partner clinic. Show your digital membership card. Get treated according to your package benefits.
